prompt.content:
1. What are the top 3 departments (i.e., Owners) by greatest total number of calendar weeks with at least 1 planned task for that department in phase 1? For each of these departments, (i) how many total calendar weeks is the department expected to be working on at least 1 task in phase 1; (ii) how many high-probability risks does the department have across all phases? Use the Phased Rollout Roadmap for (i) and Risks & Mitigations file for (ii). 

2. For the purposes of this question, consider only the 3 departments identified in Question 1. If the client increases bonuses for each department, the total number of calendar weeks on any task ("Active Weeks") is reduced by 25%. For each department, this improvement leads to cost savings of $250 per Active Week. The client would pay a total of $1,000 in one-time costs. Should the client implement this bonus strategy? Assume the strategy should be implemented if at least the total expected savings exceed total expected costs.

Round final answers to the nearest whole number. Report final answers directly in the console.
